name: Green Mountain Pie
recipeInstructions:
Crust:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Combine the macaron crumbs and melted butter Crisco. Press into the greased pie plate.
Filling:
1. Spread 2 cups of lime sherbet over the crust in the preheated pie plate.
2. Freeze for about 1 hour until firm.
3. Add 4 cups of softened vanilla ice cream to the frozen lime sherbet, and mix well.
4. Mix in an additional 1 and 1/2 cups of soft macaron crumbs.
5. Spread evenly over the ice cream mixture.
6. Freeze for several hours until set.
7. Before serving, remove from the freezer and allow to sit at room temperature for 10-15 minutes.
